post_rendered:
Mafia Game 304
Epic! the Mafia Game

  • Rules
    • Read the rules. All of them. Read them multiple times if necessary.
    • Do not post at night.
    • You may PM me at any time and ask me anything, such as rule clarification.
    • Do not quote or pretend to quote any PMs from me, including role PMs.
    • Do not talk about this game outside of this topic to anyone other than the mods in charge, unless I specifically allow you to do so.
    • Day chat will be enabled via an AoPS private forum.
    • You may not use any formatting that has an effect of concealing text. This includes hide="", color=#FFFFFF, and color=white, among others.
    • Do not edit or delete posts you have already submitted; this includes editing right after you post (what goes in the thread stays in the thread). If you for any reason find the need to change your post, use EBWOP or EBWON as necessary.
    • If you are neither a living participant of the game nor an NPC with permission, do not post anything else about the game anywhere. You may still spectate the game, but you may no longer post in this thread.
    • Do not advocate for breaking the rules.
    • Do not imitate the mods.
  • Voting/Elimination
    • This game will partially use the voting rules philosophy of "if it looks like a vote, it's a vote". So spelling/capitalization does not matter so long as the “Vote:” part is right, and the following two rules are met.
    • Post votes in bold font in the format "Vote: <insert player here>", or c or code text: 
      Vote: <insert player here>
      .
    • Votes may not be placed in hide tags.
    • You may vote for no elimination to occur during a day. Vote this by including in your post "Vote: No Elimination" or: 
      Vote: No Elimination
      .
    • You do not have to unvote before making a new vote, though you have the ability to do so. Unvote in the format "Unvote" or: 
      Unvote
      . An unvote will undo your previous vote, if any.
    • If the deadline is met the player with the most votes is eliminated. If there is a tie, the player who received the votes first is eliminated.
    • On some days, If more than half of the votes are for a single player, that player will be eliminated. It will then immediately be twilight.
    • The moment the deadline passes, it will be twilight and no more votes will be counted even if the mod has not made a post.
    • During twilight, players may still post. However, no more votes and/or unvotes will be processed.
    • Once I (or the appropriate NPC) post a end-of-day scene, the person eliminated (if any) is officially dead. Night then immediately begins. You may not post during night.

  • Activity
    • Most days will be 240 hours (10 days). The moderator may extend the deadline for the end of the day at their discretion.
    • The night deadline will be 48 hours after night begins.
    • When the night deadline is met, if the moderator does not receive a night action from either a player or his/her partner(s) (if you have them), the player will lose the chance to perform an action during that night.
    • Night will end at some time after the night deadline when the mod (or the appropriate NPC) makes the post announcing the end of night.
    • If a player does not post in a 48-hour period and they are not in V/LA, you will receive a PM prod.
    • If a player does not post in another 24-hour period after receiving a PM prod and they are not in V/LA, they will be replaced, unless you post before the moderator finds a replacement.
    • If a player is going to be V/LA, they must PM me. The moderator will not prod the player unless the V/LA is too long. Note that the nature of the twists of this game makes the tolerance for length of a V/LA shorter than normal.

  • Etiquette
    • Do not use inappropriate language or make personal attacks.
    • Be mature.
    • The game is to not be considered over until the mod declares it as such.
    • Don't intentionally/purposely gamethrow. If you believe you can no longer win talk to me in your role pm.
    • For a minor rule infraction, players can receive up to two warnings. If a player commits an infraction after they have run out of warnings, or commits a mod-interference level infraction, they may be removed or force replaced. Please do not make me remove you.

  • Moderators/Co-Moderators
    • I (NDMath) am the moderator of Mafia Game 304.
    • This brown (#974E03) is my mod color. Do not post in anything too similar.
    • The moderator may change the rules at any time. Some twists will change the rules, particularly the voting rules.
    • The moderator has the last say in interpreting the rules.
    • Special thanks to WisteriaV for looking over everything.

  • Read all of the rules
Story
The Troy Saga
Tonight we make the Trojans pay
Ten years of war they beat us slowly

Think of your wives and your children
Your families wonder where you've been

Find that inner strength now
Use that well of pride

Ask yourself inside what do you live for, what do you try for, what do you wish for, what do you fight for?
Penelope. Penelope. Penelope.
I'm on my way.
ATTACK!!!

How could I hurt you?
I'm just a man who's trying to go home.
Even after all the years away from what I've known
I'm just a man, who's fighting for his life

But when does a comet become a meteor?
When does a candle become a blaze?
When does a man become a monster?
When does a ripple become a tidal wave?
When does the reason become the blame?
When does a man become a monster?
Forgive me. Forgive me. I'm just a man.

After a great victory in Troy, Odysseus's crew returned to their fleet, to sail back home. This voyage however, would not be an easy one. Between the monsters, and the gods, and even some of the people on the ships, there were a lot of forces trying to stop Odysseus's crew from returning to Ithaca safely.

Fourteen men. Fourteen men under my command.
With only one goal in mind.
Make it back alive to our homeland.
Fourteen men. Six hundred miles of open sea.
But the problem's not the distance.
It's what lies in between.
And Ithaca's waiting. And Ithica's waiting.
Penelope's waiting. For me.
So full speed ahead. Full speed ahead.

Look! There in the distance, I see an island!


Twists
This game will feature a series of twists, following along with Epic the Musical. Be warned, some songs were cut from this game and others only might be included depending on what happens. Other creative liberties were taken, such as not all player characters in this game were actually part of Odyssey's crew.
There is a special mechanic in the form of a series of NPCs (non-player characters). These NPCs primarily exist to present twists in a flavorful manner, however they may have influence (some more than others) on the game despite not having win conditions.

Setup
The setup is closed.
The mafia do not have a factional attack; Instead mafia will be informed in advance of all game twists, and have influence over some of them.
Players are multitasking by default.
It is also guaranteed that nobody will die during the night phases of this game.

The action resolution for this game is Reasonable Action Resolution.
Private Chats are via AoPS forum with daychat enabled.
No action may self-target unless stated otherwise in the player's role pm.
Example Vanilla Townie PM wrote:
Welcome NDMath to Mafia Game 304,

You are {Character Name here} (Vanilla Townie), a member of the Crew of the Odyssey. After the ten years fighting in the Trojan War, you are ready to return to Ithaca. Unfortunately, it will not be easy.

You win when all Mafia members are dead and a member of the Town is in Ithaca.
(flavor in example role pm has been generalized)
Mafia members have safe names, in the form of VT role pms.


Alive (6)
1. duke_of_wedgewood - Antinous (Mafia Roleblocker)
3. ibmo0907 - Amphinomus (Mafia Goon)
4. K124659 - Elpenor (Vanilla Townie)
5. awesomeming327. - Nestor (Town Filling Neighborizer)
6. justJen - Philoetius (Vanilla Townie)
7. galaxy1220 - Melanthius (Mafia Fruit Vendor)

Dead (8)
Ruegerbyrd - Agamemnon (Vanilla Townie)
sdmd - Eurymachus (Mafia Goon)
mathjay RTG - Perimedes (Vanilla Townie)
saturnrocket - Meneleus (Vanilla Townie)
BananaBall00 - Odysseus (Survivor Mentee Combined Motion Detector Vanilla Cop)
violetmx12 - Telemachus (Town Day-Worm)
atomicpianowitch - Teucer (Vanilla Townie)
balllightning37 mhgelgi - Eurylochus (Town Roleblocker)


Notable Stuff
Day 1 Begins
Polyphemus Twist Announced
balllightning37 replaces mhgelgi
Ruegerbyrd dies, Day continues
Day 1 Ends; Night 1 Begins
Aeolus Twist Announced
Night 1 Ends; Day 2 Begins; Poseidon Twist Announced
mathjay replaces RTG
Day 2 Ends; Night 2 Begins
Circe Twist Announced
Night 2 Ends; Day 3 Begins
Day 3 Ends; Night 3 Begins
Underworld Twist Announced; Night 3 Ends; Day 4 Begins
duke_of_wedgewood must cast their vote
balllightning37 must cast their vote
ibmo0907 must cast their vote
galaxy1220 must cast their vote
justJen must cast their vote
K124659 and awesomeming327. must cast their votes
Day 4 Ends; Game Ends


Current state: Game is Over!

post_rendered:
I'm telling you, this life is amazing when you greet it with open arms.
Whatever we face we'll be fine if we're leading from the heart.

Welcome! (welcome!)
Lotus Eaters, could you tell us where there's other food to eat?
The Cave! (cave!)
A Cave! They're saying there's a cave where we could feast. And where could we find this food filled cave?
East! (that way!)

And so, Odysseus's crew was off once again, sailing towards a cave, in search of food before they continued their voyage home.

It is now Day 1. Deadline elimination is on, majority elimination is off. The Day 1 deadline is August 11th at 8:00 pm CDT. You may now post.

Welcome to this game. I want to make a high quality wallpost to start this game, and so I will start off. Let's think about this game and the core of mafia as a whole. Mafia was invented in 1941 by John P. Mafia, who stole the game from aristotle. That's right, he was a CRIMINAL. As you can probably guess, John P. Mafia was apart of the mafia. Nevertheless, the game was rediscovered by a man named Dimitry Davidoff, who was originally named Vanill A. Townie, but changed his name to sound russian to try as an excuse to make matryoshka dolls apart of the game (Have you ever wondered who k*lls the people when they are hung? That's right, they get consumed by a matryoshka doll. Be Scared). However, we all know that mafia is an italian game, made by philosopher Aristotle in the year 400 BC. We normally do not credit him since his game was about "Impostors" among us, which isn't like modern mafia. So mafia is an italian game and a russian game, but it's also a german game. John P. Mafia was german but had to flee the country due to being convicted of tax fraud. When he came to america, he decided to rename himself Cosa Nostra because otherwise he wouldn't have been allowed (germans were not popular with americans at the time). When he was finally in america, he came to new york and started organized cirme, called the mafia, in honor of his old name. "Tschuss, Deuschland!", he said. Now, he had to compete with the bratva and the yakuza for dominance, and eventually won it over. It was said for a streak of like 9 or 10 years or something mafia had won over new york. TODAY, WE END THAT STREAK! We will save new york on this ship I deem the odyssey (name taken from Aristotle, who was homer's younger brother and Jorge Rivera-Herrans great-great-great-great-great-great-great-great-great-great-great-great-great-great-great-great-great-great-great-great-great-great-great-great-great-great-great-great-great-great-great-great-great-great-great-great-great grandfather)! This will be a win by town, as Vanill would have wanted! Today, we will not lose to some german criminal who commited tax fraud! We will win, in honor of the inventor of modern mafia! Who even is the mafia in this game? just a bunch of scrubs, that is! We will find you and hunt you down, @mafia! It is town's time to shine! On three, we say "for town"

1, 2, 3... "FOR TOWN!!!!" says everyone except jen, bb00, and RTG who are my official godreads and are probably disciples of John P. Mafia...

Number.prototype.between = function(a, b, inclusive) {
  var min = Math.min(a, b),

min -=1, max += 1;

return (parseInt($(quote_box).parents(".cmty-post-tr").children(".cmty-post-middle").children(".cmty-post-top-inline.cmty-post-top-data").children(".cmty-post-top").children(".cmty-post-number").text().slice(1)).between(start,end) )

post_rendered:
galaxy
tmi post about 1-shot items
there are a few interesting things about this
first is the statement
I can see two possibilities (or both of them can simultaneously be true)
sdmd says that "maybe [scum] get special one-shot abilities based on twists"
possibility 1: this is a true tmi slip disguised to look like speculation
possibility 2: sdmd purposefully worded it that way, and it looks even worse now with the boats. take the same quote, but change scum to town, and you get "maybe [town] get special one-shot abilities based on twists." but the thing is, that's exactly what happened. we get a 1-shot linked parity cop based on the current twist. sdmd probably knew that he would get called out for this post once the twist happened so he worded it this way so that it would seem like really good speculation as opposed to tmi.
the second interesting thing is that inexperienced/newbscum, at least the ones I've noticed in my non-main forum games, tend to rely on and feel more inclined towards their scumpartners in general. sdmd fits these criteria (this is his second wolfgame I'm p sure), and in a game like this where scum have tmi, he would be more comfortable discussing mech info with someone who would not notice the tmi (an inexperienced player) or someone who would notice the tmi but act like it never happened (an experienced wolfpartner). i don't think galaxy is the first but I do think that he could be the second. there's also another interesting post in the galaxy-sdmd interaction
galaxy1220 wrote:

The worldview on violet feels overly performative and they are clearly pointing out the obvious but I mindmeld with them a lot on bb00 + upon further revision I think reading into the tmi on mech was probably not that wise; I am probably not going to hop onto a sdmd wagon (at least this in game day) and reevaluate the wagon after the first hang (which is hopefully on one of rueger/bb. Idk it just feels like they have some redeeming qualities
the interesting part of this quote is bolded. galaxy clearly says that sdmd's tmi on mech is not important when it actually is one of the main reasons why he was scumread by a lot of people. add to that that galaxy was also strongly pushing rueger, and rueger flipped town, which is not scum indicative in of itself but when coupled with the other stuff I mentioned makes galaxy look a bit worse.

post_rendered:
blight
I've put blight at a slight tl
firstly, I haven't gotten an explanation that makes sense as to why blight is scum (except ming saying that blight is scum for his interaction with saturn)
secondly, his interaction with sdmd, even though it's only 1 post, has a bit of support for this
sdmd says that blight "is prob not scum" because mhgelgi "was having activity issues but his posts didn't flare off a clear scum meta" and that "the scumreads tried on him didn't work."
however, this is pretty weak reasoning, at least from my point of view because activity is nai and I don't get what "scumreads tried on him didn't work" even means
there are two ways this could go
1. sdmd was protecting his wolfmate
to me, this honestly doesn't seem as likely
sdmd probably already knows that townreading his wolfmates for weak reasons will just make town look into them
and I'm not really sure why he would do that unless he's really bad at wolf or he's just throwing or if he did it subconsciously
2. sdmd was saying blight was town because if blight flipped town, it would give him towncred, not noticing that it could be interpreted as tmi
this would basically gives us the free knowledge that blight is town
I think this is more likely because looking at his first scum game (301) he's not that good at wolfing, but then again all he had to deal with there was convincing a few clueless newbies to vote ostriches because he survived as an experienced
there is also the slight possibility of reverse psychology which I think a newbwolf might think is a good idea but idk
to sum up, basically the sdmd-blight interaction is kinda wifom but I'm inclined to view blight as more townier than scummy because second scenario (at least to me) seems more likely than first
the only drawback I have to this read is that the interaction was only 1 post long which isn't a lot to build off of and could potentially be very weak and misguided but I hope not

ibmo0907 wrote:
galaxy
tmi post about 1-shot items
there are a few interesting things about this
first is the statement
I can see two possibilities (or both of them can simultaneously be true)
sdmd says that "maybe [scum] get special one-shot abilities based on twists"
possibility 1: this is a true tmi slip disguised to look like speculation
possibility 2: sdmd purposefully worded it that way, and it looks even worse now with the boats. take the same quote, but change scum to town, and you get "maybe [town] get special one-shot abilities based on twists." but the thing is, that's exactly what happened. we get a 1-shot linked parity cop based on the current twist. sdmd probably knew that he would get called out for this post once the twist happened so he worded it this way so that it would seem like really good speculation as opposed to tmi.
the second interesting thing is that inexperienced/newbscum, at least the ones I've noticed in my non-main forum games, tend to rely on and feel more inclined towards their scumpartners in general. sdmd fits these criteria (this is his second wolfgame I'm p sure), and in a game like this where scum have tmi, he would be more comfortable discussing mech info with someone who would not notice the tmi (an inexperienced player) or someone who would notice the tmi but act like it never happened (an experienced wolfpartner). i don't think galaxy is the first but I do think that he could be the second. there's also another interesting post in the galaxy-sdmd interaction

original post
blight
I've put blight at a slight tl
firstly, I haven't gotten an explanation that makes sense as to why blight is scum (except ming saying that blight is scum for his interaction with saturn)
secondly, his interaction with sdmd, even though it's only 1 post, has a bit of support for this
sdmd says that blight "is prob not scum" because mhgelgi "was having activity issues but his posts didn't flare off a clear scum meta" and that "the scumreads tried on him didn't work."
however, this is pretty weak reasoning, at least from my point of view because activity is nai and I don't get what "scumreads tried on him didn't work" even means
there are two ways this could go
1. sdmd was protecting his wolfmate
to me, this honestly doesn't seem as likely
sdmd probably already knows that townreading his wolfmates for weak reasons will just make town look into them
and I'm not really sure why he would do that unless he's really bad at wolf or he's just throwing or if he did it subconsciously
2. sdmd was saying blight was town because if blight flipped town, it would give him towncred, not noticing that it could be interpreted as tmi
this would basically gives us the free knowledge that blight is town

tbh i've held off on explaining my thoughts so far but here we go ig

personally i believe we should hang ship c. it's an extremely polarizing ship and whatever everyone on there flips will give us the most information. i don't believe in hanging ship b because i find most of the ship b players to be towny or at the very least not nearly stirring the pot in terms of dramatic thread control as ship c. i find ming to be playing decently similar as they did in 302 (i think), and i tr them as of rn. also rtg argues that there could be a larger number of wolves in ship a hiding behind townies, operating under the assumption wolves made the ships in the first place (or nd wanting to be spicy). i think "if mafia had say over" with such certainty is literally scum logic, as it's incredibly easy as mafia to set that up then push a boat full of townies with that reverse reasoning. besides the obvious fact that i don't want to sink my own ship, i do think the people on my boat are town (duke, mainly) or at the very least not people i feel we urgently need to see the flips of right now. also k12 has shown some genuine solving/skepticism within our thread and in this one as well. i also don't know what y'all see in violet as town (i've heard varying arguments for this), and i mildly sr violet as of now. their play/push has been incredibly performative, circular, and i haven't been convinced of my ship's wolfiness from them at all (i would vote against my ship if i strongly believed 2+ wolves existed on it, but i don't believe this is the case). i do think bb00's consistency in opposing violet/expressing their own opinions and not immediately jumping onto this ship is towny (i'm not sure how to interpret saturn's strong defense of me tbh), but i think the flips of ship c are crucial, especially to give us a better look at more possible pairings. also saturn's post #1636 is strangely emotional from them, something i don't usually see regardless of whether they're wolf or town. also yeah saturn i WILL take accountability. ship b is quite lhf for most voters as of rn but i don't think that's the right choice rn. if you can give me a reason why mafia would put you all together (under y'alls assumption that mafia made these ships) besides "oh yeah they stuck four suspicious townies into one ship" i'd consider moving away. actually wait why would saturn say "four townies" are now on their ship when they were just pushing other members earlier? sounds quite off to me.

Vote: Ship C

ok now i have a lot to say
as I've said before I think ship b has at most one scum
looking at ship A, the only person that I'm even willing to consider as being scum is k12, whom I put at null for meta issues. however, the only arguments I've seen against k12 is meta arguments (which isn't even a solid argument as activity is nai) and the scumslip argument (but iirc no one has even produced the scumslip)
my srs currently are galaxy and bb00
so now I'm looking at pairs
and the 2 wolf remaining case gives 2 of {k12, galaxy, someone on ship c}
this is pretty evenly spread, but k12 arguments would point to {galaxy,someone on ship c} or 2 people on ship c
however the 3 wolf case is not
if wolves are evenly spread, then it would make sense to vote b off
however, as I've already mentioned, I do not think there is a valid argument for k12 being scum here
and since there is at most 1 wolf on ship b, there are at least 2 wolves on ship C
this may not seem plausible but considering I already sr bb00, this makes more sense to me
and from what I've seen saturn say, there are at least two townies on ship c
this actually fits in really well with my argument
if there are at least 2 confirmed townies, then there can be anywhere from 0 to 2 scum on the ship-which goes from 0 to 2 to 1 to 2 if bb00 is not in the list of confirmed townies-so there is at least 1 scum on ship c
an argument against this is the all pr claim and mech
however, again, the 2 conf townies argument, and the fact that there may be mafia fakeclaim(s) or mafia pr(s) like rolecop or smthn that could give mech info but without any mech info to clear them

so yes, right now, I am more inclined towards voting ship c than ship b (and getting out galaxy after that)
but I need more info about ship c, which they've kept pretty gated
if there is a sufficient argument for ship c (ie 3 townies/3prs get confirmed) then I will be willing to vote ship b and get the non-confirmed townie on ship c out the next day

Hey guys, I'm sorry. This is a cool game, but I'm not really feeling into mafia at the moment. I messaged ND to replace me. If he doesn't, I'll still try to get back at some point, but for now I feel like it will be best for the game if someone else could take over.

I'm sorry apw, I wanted to play a full game with you, but when I don't have the motivation, it's hard to keep up with the thread, and if I can't do that, I feel bad for pushing reads that are disingenuous.

Anyway for now, I believe Ship A is the best bet. It has the most amount of players I am sus or neutral of. I think my ship has a lot of town equity, the only thing I can say is that bball and violet are pretty chummy in there and while it can come from town and I believe violet has been especially townie in there, I always would remain cautious of that possibility. Saturn is undoubtedly townie though, and I believe that my neighbourhood most likely contains 4 town.

Good luck, I think we have a good chance at this game, and I think my shipmates and I have melded well and have similar correct thoughts on the game.

"Back on the open sea, Odysseus encounters a siren disguised as his wife Penelope. While playing along with her charade, he asks her how he can return home, and she reveals that can only happen by going through the lair of the six-headed sea monster Scylla, where even Poseidon would never enter. She then asks Odysseus to join her in the water, saying that she could relieve all of his suffering ("Suffering"). Odysseus appears to give in before attacking her and exposing her identity. He reveals that he and his crew resisted her magical song by plugging their ears with beeswax, and his crew captures the rest of the sirens in the water. The sirens beg for mercy, but Odysseus vows to not make the same mistake he made with Polyphemus and commands his crew to krill them all ("Different Beast"). The crew then sail towards Scylla's lair, where Eurylochus reveals to Odysseus that he was the one who opened Aeolus's wind bag. Ignoring him, Odysseus commands that Eurylochus distribute six torches as they sail through the dark lair. Scylla, attracted to the light, eats the men holding the torches, allowing the rest of the crew to escape unharmed ("Scylla").

Horrified by Odysseus's willingness to sacrifice his own men, Eurylochus leads a mutiny, subduing and imprisoning the captain. The crew lands the ship on the nearest island, which happens to be the home of the sun god Helios. Despite warnings from Odysseus, Eurylochus krills one of Helios's sacred cows for food ("Mutiny"). Angered by this disrespect, Helios sends Zeus to pass judgement on the crew. The god forces Odysseus to choose between allowing either himself or his remaining men to be krilled. Determined to return home, Odysseus ultimately chooses the latter. Zeus spares Odysseus but destroys his ship and krills the rest of his crew ("Thunder Bringer")."

{blight, duke, galaxy, jen}

this means 2 wolves left (which could be valid)

then it's at one of {blight, duke, galaxy, jen} but because blight/duke cannot be v/v, it's one of them (more likely to be duke considering ming is a wolf)

whether it be 2 or 3 wolves my solving lies completely within
{blight, duke, jen, ibmo, ming}
3 from A, 2 from B
assuming wolves had influence on who goes on what ship it's either 2-1, 1-1, 2-0, and it's very unlikely to be 3-0 (why would they put themselves with a wolfy player if they were all wolves who were fine on their own? the only reason I can think of is if they wanted two ships full of townies to sink but then why put me on ship A (unless if WIFOM but that's just a terrible stretch))

also for the twists I figured it out but I don't know if someone figured it out before
there are 8 sagas
the first one was troy and meeting the lotus-eaters, which is the background for this game
The second one was polythemus
the third one is the bag from aeolous
the fourth one was them being turned into pigs by circe (the ships twist was custom-made by ND to strengthen the wolves most likely which makes me think it's only 2 wolves left since if three wolves were alive by this twist the risk would be very high (which would've happened if no wolves died d1). however, the vote lock is an equal case to say it could be a 4v3. Also, the ships twist could be loosely based off of the posedain saga (with aeuolous), which has ships sinking, which would align with ND going in order.)
the fifth one is where we at (the underworld saga).
Quote:
Sailing into the underworld, Odysseus and his crew pass by the souls of his slain fleet, including Polites, as well as Odysseus's mother Anticlea, whom he now realizes had died while waiting for him to return home ("The Underworld"). Odysseus eventually reaches Tiresias, who states that despite having clairvoyant vision of the past and future, he does not see any future in which Odysseus returns home unchanged ("No Longer You"). Distraught upon hearing this, Odysseus decides to bury his softer side, embracing ruthlessness and resolving to return home by any means necessary, comparing himself to the other monsters he'd fought on his travels ("Monster").

him passing by the souls of his "crew" makes sense as to why everyone has a neighborhood with a dead person.
Also, can everyone claim their neighborhoods? I'm with sdmd.
odysseus reaches tiresias, who is the clairvoyant seer (hm). He tells odysseus he's going to go through purgatory basically and odysseus goes through self-reflection, and here is what makes sense for odysseus to be a survivor. Nowhere here does it add up for this vote lock to be flavor related.

the sixth one is actually the thunder saga. this is where odysseus' crew fights the siren disguised as penelope and then eurylochus stages the mutiny and the rest of odysseus' crew died. There's honestly a better chance ND would skip to this one if it's a 4v3 than go through the underworld saga but idk.

post_rendered:
for future reference, python code to print every place you nest more than 3 quotes

f=open('test.txt', 'r')
s=f.read()
ct=0
o=""
for i in range(len(s)-7):
    if s[i:i+7]=="[quote=":
        ct+=1
    elif s[i:i+7]=="[/quote":
        ct-=1
    if ct>3:
        o+=s[i]
print(o)

On Day 3, if duke was eliminated (which again was probably the second most considered option), then town is able to get the linked parity cop off and is in a very strong position over scum.
On Day 4, if duke was eliminated (which almost happened), then from balllightning's perspective, Jen/K12/Ming are all essentially cleared, and with the Vengeful twist at F5 he can force a win if faster than mafia, and even if not would most likely win F3 anyway.

Thoughts on Game Design + Gameplay, as well as what would've happened if game continued coming SoonTM.

After leaving the underworld, the mood among the crew had shifted to a more somber one. And with it, truths started to spill out. But not all truths, as secretly, not all of those still aboard the ship cared for it to return to Ithaca safely. To avoid Poseidon, the crew decided to sail through Scylla's Lair. However, this meant that the six of them had to fight the six headed monster. Although they were successful in staying alive, they were not able to do anything else that night.

Okay, not nothing. They did find the time to cause trouble upon a cow as the sun rose.
A very important cow.
But for better or for worse, this was not the worst decision the crew made during this journey.

post_rendered:
Notes about previous twists:

Pregame - fallliinqsnow- was Athena, and negotiated pregame to have Odysseus be randed from 3 players of their choice instead of the full playerlist. Unknown to them, in the event that Telemachus picked Odysseus the night before Odysseus died, Athena would become a Town Mentor of Telemachus.
Night 1 - 3 players that opened the Wind Bag would receive 1-Shot Tracker items. Coincidentally exactly 3 players opened the Wind Bag. If more had, the strongest town pr, weakest mafia member, and a random other player (that's not Odysseus) opening the bag would receive the items. If nobody at all opened the wind bag, town would immediately win; mafia was informed of this and not town to prevent that from happening.
Day 2 - Mafia chose the boat splits, but if all 4 mafia were alive they had to put at least 1 player on each ship; This prevented the game from ending in a mafia win until after the underworld twist.
Night 2 - NoSignOfTheta (as Hermes) gave two players of the mafia's choice a visit to exempt them from the post restriction the following day. Theta was given freedom on what to say between first and last message, and decided to troll. I should've prevented the avatar thing but was too late by when I noticed.
Day 4 - Mafia divided the players into the neighborhood pairings the night prior; The vote order was determined entirely by Spec Chat because 3 mafia were alive, with the most scumread players voting earlier. Thanks to Scan/ad/snow this resulted in the mafia having to vote before the town; Snow wins the most accurate shoutout for almost nailing the scumteam exactly.

violet, saturn and I were 3 of the first 4 to be on the sdmd wagon, yet somehow our ship is the one that gets voted out??? Town just tends to outread themselves and it ends up in random bad hangs influenced by mafia more often than not.

I obviously played very inactive and bad and should have fixed that during the game, but rolling VT again and having zero info and being scumread and therefore zero pull as town yet again (I don't even know why this game, I was literally being scumread from my very first RVS post) kinda made me lose interest. Idk what it is I've never had the issue of being able to townlead before. The paranoia and eventual hang on my slot every game has been annoying, especially when I seem to always get hung due to activity. Again, this is why I hate deadline hang and think majority in this forum is vastly superior due to having players like myself who aren't as active, but I'm not gonna get into that argument again.

Anyway, this game makes me sad, as we had the solution in our grasp and still somehow lost. I think I'm going to be taking a several month break from mafia now as the consistent town misplays and losses/rolling boring roles/not being able to influence town has made me less motivated to play unfortunately. I'll probably be back for the next fdas game lol.
